description: bl review currently drops the whole -m message into the commit title, producing very long one-line subjects. Fix: split the message on the first newline (or first blank line) into title + body. Append [bl-xxxx] to the title only. Emit as a proper two-part git commit message (title, blank line, body). git log --oneline should show clean short subjects. Update SKILL.md to instruct agents to pass structured messages via bl review -m. Unit tests for the formatter, integration test that passes a multi-line message and asserts the subject is the title-only form.
title: bl review: 50/72-style commit messages with title+body split
